app.title: OpsKat
app.subtitle: AI-Powered Intelligent Ops Platform
app.hint: Select an asset from the sidebar to get started

hints.rightClick: View asset details and more actions

forward.name: Config Name
forward.empty: No forward configs yet. Click the button above to create one.
forward.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete forward config "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

asset.title: Assets
asset.name: Name
asset.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this group (optional, visible to AI)
asset.emptyDesc: Add SSH, database, Redis, and other assets to start connecting.
asset.noMatchDesc: Adjust the search or filters and try again.
asset.cmdPolicyHint: Commands not listed will require user confirmation. Rules support * wildcards; broad patterns such as * may allow high-risk commands or deny many commands, so configure them carefully.
asset.cmdPolicyGroupHint: This policy is inherited by all assets in the group (unless overridden)
asset.cmdPolicyPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated for batch import

policyReset.confirmDefault: Are you sure you want to reset to default policy? Your custom rules will be overwritten.
policyReset.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all policy rules?

asset.deleteGroupDesc: This group has {{count}} assets. Choose how to handle them:
asset.deleteGroupDescDetailed: This group contains {{assetCount}} direct assets and {{childGroupCount}} child groups. Child groups will move to the parent after deletion. Choose how to handle direct assets:
asset.deleteGroupDescChildrenOnly: This group contains {{childGroupCount}} child groups. Child groups will move to the parent after deletion.
asset.deleteAssetDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
asset.passwordPlaceholder: Enter password (leave empty to prompt on connect)
asset.passwordUnchanged: Set, leave empty to keep unchanged
asset.noManagedKeys: No managed keys yet. Add one in Settings first.
asset.noManagedPasswords: No managed passwords yet. Add one in Settings first.
asset.credentialsHint: Credentials will be encrypted and stored securely.
asset.formDescription: Configure asset connection details, authentication, and advanced options.
asset.kafkaConnectClusterRequired: At least one Connect cluster is required
asset.kafkaConnectClusterInvalid: Connect cluster name and URL are required
asset.queryPolicyHint: Uses default policy when not configured
asset.queryPolicyPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated, e.g. SELECT, INSERT
asset.queryPolicyFlagPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated for batch import
asset.redisPolicyHint: Commands not listed will require user confirmation. Rules support * wildcards; broad patterns such as * may allow high-risk commands or deny many commands, so configure them carefully.
asset.redisPolicyPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated for batch import
asset.mongoPolicyHint: Uses default policy when not configured
asset.mongoPolicyPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated, e.g. find, aggregate
asset.kafkaPolicyHint: Kafka operations not listed will require user confirmation. Rules support * wildcards; broad patterns such as * may allow high-risk operations or deny many operations, so configure them carefully.
asset.kafkaPolicyPlaceholder: Add action/resource rules, e.g. topic.read orders-*
asset.k8sPolicyHint: Commands not listed will require user confirmation. Rules support * wildcards; broad patterns such as * may allow high-risk commands or deny many commands, so configure them carefully.
asset.k8sPolicyPlaceholder: Press Enter to add, comma-separated for batch import
asset.k8sPolicyTestPlaceholder: Type a kubectl command to test, e.g. kubectl get pods
asset.k8sKubeconfigEditPlaceholder: Kubeconfig is stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep current; type new content to replace.
asset.policyTestSqlPlaceholder: Type SQL to test, e.g. SELECT * FROM users
asset.policyTestRedisPlaceholder: Type Redis command to test, e.g. GET user:1
asset.policyTestMongoPlaceholder: Type MongoDB operation to test, e.g. find
asset.policyTestKafkaPlaceholder: Type Kafka operation to test, e.g. topic.read orders

policyGroup.deleteConfirm: Delete policy group "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

kafka-metadata-readonly.name: Kafka Metadata Read-Only
kafka-metadata-readonly.desc: Allow cluster, broker, topic, and consumer group metadata reads

kafka-schema-readonly.name: Schema Registry Read-Only
kafka-schema-readonly.desc: Allow reading Schema Registry metadata and schemas

kafka-connect-readonly.name: Kafka Connect Read-Only
kafka-connect-readonly.desc: Allow reading connector status and configs

kafka-operator.name: Kafka Operator
kafka-operator.desc: Allow topic, partition, and consumer group offset management

kafka-dangerous-deny.name: Kafka Dangerous Deny
kafka-dangerous-deny.desc: Deny destructive and security-sensitive Kafka operations

sshKey.title: SSH Keys
sshKey.name: Key Name
sshKey.deleteConfirm: Delete key "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
sshKey.deleteConfirmUsage: Key "{{name}}" is used by: {{assets}}. These assets will no longer be able to connect with it. Continue?
sshKey.commentPlaceholder: Public key comment (defaults to name if empty)
sshKey.passphrasePlaceholderOptional: Private key password (optional, leave empty for no encryption)
sshKey.oldPassphraseHint: Leave empty if the key has no passphrase
sshKey.passphraseMismatch: New passphrase entries do not match
sshKey.empty: No keys yet. Use the buttons above to add one.

credential.title: Credentials
credential.name: Name
credential.deleteConfirm: Delete credential "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
credential.deleteConfirmUsage: Credential "{{name}}" is used by: {{assets}}. These assets will no longer be able to connect. Continue?

import.title: Import
import.tabbyDesc: Import SSH connection profiles from Tabby terminal
import.vaultPassphrase: Enter Tabby Vault master password to import passwords

connectProgress.hostKeyVerify: First connection, please verify host key
connectProgress.hostKeyChangedWarning: The remote host key has changed. This could mean someone is performing a man-in-the-middle attack, or the server has been reinstalled. If unsure, reject the connection and contact the server administrator.

settings.sendBehaviorDesc: Configure how AI chat messages are sent
settings.deleteProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
settings.defaultApiBase: Default API endpoint will be used
settings.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one to get started.
settings.maxOutputTokensHint: Maximum tokens for model response. 0 = use model default
settings.contextWindowHint: Context window size in tokens. 0 = use model default
settings.reasoningEffortHint: Off: no reasoning. Low: fast, fewer tokens. Medium: balanced (default). High: deep reasoning. XHigh: deepest reasoning, highest latency & cost. Max (Anthropic only): no token-spend cap.
settings.reasoningEffortUnsupportedHint: This model may not support this setting; it only applies on compatible models.

backup.title: Backup
backup.fileDesc: Export or import backup files, with optional encryption
backup.confirmImport: Import will replace all existing data. Continue?
backup.webdavDesc: Encrypted backup to a WebDAV directory
backup.deviceFlowDesc: Open the link below in your browser and enter the code
backup.credentialWarning: Backup file will be encrypted with the password. Keep the password safe.
backup.encryptedFile: This backup is encrypted. Enter password to decrypt.
backup.replaceWarning: Replace mode will delete all existing data in selected modules. This cannot be undone!

setup.title: Configure AI Assistant
setup.subtitle: Choose a method to start using the AI assistant
setup.opsctlRequired: opsctl CLI not installed. Plugin features may be limited. Install in Settings > Integration.
setup.openAICompatibleDesc: Works with OpenAI, DeepSeek, and other major APIs
setup.opsctlBannerDesc: Install the opsctl CLI and enable the AI Skill plugin to manage and operate your server assets directly from Claude Code, Codex, and other AI coding tools.
setup.settingsHint: You can manage and switch AI providers later in Settings

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.notConfigured: Please configure AI Provider in Settings
ai.approvalLocalToolTitle: AI wants to run local {{tool}} tool
ai.approvalLocalToolPatternHint: One pattern per line; * wildcards (local_bash matches commands, local_write/local_edit matches paths).
ai.permissionRequestHint: AI is requesting command execution permission. You can edit the pattern before approving.
ai.deleteConversationDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
ai.mentionNotFound: No assets, databases, or tables found
ai.editResendHint: Submitting will resend the conversation from this message.
ai.regenerateConfirm: Regenerating will delete this message and all messages after it. Are you sure?

error.auth: Authentication failed, please check API Key

sidebar.title: AI Assistant
sidebar.emptyGuide: Click + to start a new chat, or pick one from <history/> History

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.desc: Click a shortcut to rebind, press Esc to cancel

empty.noContent: No items. Add an asset first.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.desc: Terminal color scheme and font settings
terminal.customFontPlaceholder: Enter font-family, e.g. Iosevka Term, monospace
terminal.scrollbackHint: Maximum lines retained for scrolling back. Larger values use more memory (range 100 - 1000000).
terminal.gpuAccelerationHint: Use WebGL to render the terminal. Auto-disables on init failure.
terminal.gpuAccelerationErrorInitThrew: WebGL renderer was auto-disabled because it failed to initialize.
terminal.gpuAccelerationErrorContextLoss: WebGL renderer was auto-disabled because the GPU context was lost.
terminal.invalidThemeJson: Clipboard content is not a valid theme JSON

integration.title: Integration
integration.desc: CLI tool and AI plugin integration
integration.cliDesc: Command-line tool for managing assets without the GUI
integration.pathHint: Add this directory to your PATH if not already included
integration.noEmbedded: No embedded binary. Build with: make build-embed
integration.manualInstallHint: Download the binary for your platform from GitHub Releases
integration.dataDirDesc: Shared database location used by both desktop app and CLI
integration.skillDesc: Install plugin so AI coding tools can use opsctl to manage your assets
integration.versionMismatch: opsctl version ({{cliVersion}}) differs from app version ({{appVersion}}), consider reinstalling to keep in sync

appUpdate.title: About
appUpdate.betaWarning: Beta releases may contain unfinished features and be less stable
appUpdate.nightlyWarning: Nightly builds are auto-built from the nightly branch and may be unstable
appUpdate.latestVersion: You are on the latest version
appUpdate.updateSuccess: Update successful. Please restart the app to apply.
appUpdate.autoUpdateFound: New version {{version}} available. Update in Settings.
appUpdate.checksumFetchFailed: Unable to fetch checksum file (SHA256SUMS.txt) from GitHub. The downloaded file cannot be verified for integrity.
appUpdate.reportBugDesc: Open GitHub issue template with version & system info pre-filled
appUpdate.debugModeDesc: Lower log level to debug for troubleshooting. Turn off when done.

opsctlApproval.title: CLI Operation Approval
opsctlApproval.description: opsctl is requesting approval for the following operation:
opsctlApproval.patternHint: Future commands matching this pattern will be auto-approved
opsctlApproval.grantDescription: Review the command patterns below. You may edit before approving.
opsctlApproval.batchDescription: The following {{count}} operations require your approval

sftp.noActiveSession: Please connect an SSH session first
sftp.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

sync.panelFromTerminal: Sync file manager to terminal directory
sync.terminalFromPanel: Change terminal directory to current file manager directory
sync.followToggle: Keep terminal and file manager directories in sync for this tab
sync.markerOverflow: Directory sync marker output was too large
sync.sessionNotFound: The terminal session no longer exists
sync.unsupported: The current shell does not support directory sync
sync.probeUnsupported: Directory sync is not available in this remote environment
sync.cwdUnknown: The terminal has not reported a working directory yet
sync.busy: Wait until the active pane returns to a clean prompt
sync.pending: A directory change is already in progress
sync.timeout: Timed out waiting for the terminal to change directory
sync.notFound: The target directory does not exist
sync.notDirectory: The selected path is not a directory
sync.accessDenied: The target directory cannot be accessed
sync.remoteFailed: The terminal rejected the directory change
sync.nonceFailed: Could not start a verified directory change

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading the page.

query.sqlPlaceholder: Enter SQL, Ctrl+Enter to execute (selection only when text is selected)
query.redisPlaceholder: Enter command, press Enter to execute
query.filterByValue: Click to filter by this value
query.kafkaSelectTopic: Select a topic to view details
query.kafkaSelectConsumerGroup: Select a consumer group to view details
query.kafkaDeleteACLConfirmDesc: Delete ACL for {{principal}} on {{resource}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaSelectSchemaSubject: Select a subject to view schema versions
query.kafkaRegisterSchemaConfirmDesc: Register a new version for subject {{subject}}.
query.kafkaDeleteSchemaVersionConfirmDesc: Delete schema subject {{subject}} version {{version}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaDeleteSubjectConfirmDesc: Delete all versions for schema subject {{subject}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaSelectConnector: Select a connector to view details
query.kafkaDeleteConnectorConfirmDesc: Delete connector {{name}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaDeleteConsumerGroupConfirmDesc: Delete consumer group {{group}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaResetOffsetConfirmDesc: Reset offsets for consumer group {{group}} on topic {{topic}} to {{mode}}.
query.kafkaDeleteTopicConfirmDesc: Delete topic {{topic}}. This cannot be undone.
query.kafkaIncreasePartitionsConfirmDesc: Increase topic {{topic}} to {{count}} partitions. Partition count cannot be decreased.
query.kafkaDeleteRecordsConfirmDesc: Delete records before offset {{offset}} on topic {{topic}} partition {{partition}}. This cannot be undone.
query.noKeySelected: Select a key to view details
query.mongoshWillParse: Press Ctrl+Enter or click Run to execute
query.mongoshHint: Type a mongosh statement, e.g. db.<collection>.find({})
query.mongoshNoDatabase: Pick a database, or use db.getSiblingDB("name") in the statement
query.copyAsTsvFieldsAndData: Tab Separated Values (Field Name and Data)
query.deleteRecordNoPrimaryKeyWarning: This table has no primary key. The delete will match all visible column values and limit the operation to one row.
query.stopLoadingToast: Stopped waiting for the current operation result
query.importDialogDesc: Import CSV or TSV rows into {{table}}
query.importNoMappedColumns: No uploaded fields match this table. Map at least one field before previewing SQL.
query.importUnmappedColumns: {{count}} uploaded field(s) are not mapped and will be skipped: {{columns}}
query.importWizardTypeIntro: This wizard allows you to specify details on how OpsKat should import your data. Which import data format would you like?
query.importSourceIntro: Please provide the file(s) and/or URL(s) to import.
query.importDelimiterIntro: What delimiter separates your fields? Select the appropriate delimiter.
query.importDelimited: Delimited - Characters such as comma or tab separate each field
query.importFixedWidth: Fixed Width - Fields are aligned in columns with spaces between each field
query.importOptionsTitle: You can define some additional options for source.
query.importMappingIntro: You can define the field mappings. Set mappings to specify the correspondence between fields in the Source and fields in the Destination.
query.importModeIntro: Please select a desired import mode.
query.importModeAppend: Append: add records to the destination table
query.importModeUpdate: Update: update records in the destination with matching records from source
query.importModeAppendUpdate: Append/Update: if records exist in destination, update it. Otherwise, add it
query.importModeAppendSkip: Append without update: if records exist in destination, skip it. Otherwise, add it
query.importModeDelete: Delete: delete records in destination that match records in source
query.importModeCopy: Copy: delete all records in destination, repopulate from the source
query.importModePrimaryKeyRequired: This mode needs at least one mapped primary key field to match existing destination records.
query.importSummaryIntro: We have gathered all information the wizard needs to import your data. Click the Start button to begin importing.
query.importUnsupportedFileType: {{count}} file(s) skipped because they do not match the selected import type
query.exportNoFileSelected: Choose where to save the export file
query.sqlPreviewDesc: The following {{count}} SQL statement(s) will be executed:
query.createTableDialogDesc: Create a new table in database {{database}}
query.tableCommentPlaceholder: Leave empty to remove table comment
query.columnCommentPlaceholder: Leave empty to remove column comment
query.createTableAtLeastOneColumn: At least one column is required
query.designTableAtLeastOneColumn: At least one column is required
query.alterDropColumnRequired: Please select a column to drop
query.updateMismatch: {{count}} edit(s) did not match any row (data may have changed elsewhere). Please refresh and retry.
query.noPrimaryKeyTooltip: This table has no primary key; UPDATE will use all columns as the WHERE condition to locate the row
query.deleteKeyConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete key "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
query.deleteElementDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
query.dangerousSqlDesc: This statement contains a destructive operation (DELETE/DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER). Are you sure you want to execute it?
query.dropTableConfirmDesc: Drop table {{table}}? This cannot be undone — both the table definition and all data will be permanently removed.
query.truncateTableConfirmDesc: Truncate table {{table}}? All rows will be permanently removed, but the table structure will be kept.
query.createRedisKeyDesc: Choose a type and write the initial value. The current database refreshes after creation.
query.redisTtlInvalid: TTL must be -1 or a positive integer in seconds
query.tableRestoredHint: {{table}} restored — click or press {{shortcut}} to load

systemStatus.title: Status
systemStatus.toastError: Startup issues detected. Click to view details.
systemStatus.toastWarn: Startup warnings detected. Click to view details.

extension.noExtensionsDesc: Extensions are installed to the extensions/ folder in the app data directory
extension.uninstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
extension.cleanDataDesc: Delete all data stored by this extension. Uncheck to keep data for reinstallation.

snippet.title: Snippets
snippet.emptyState: No snippets yet. Click + New to create one.
snippet.readOnlyTooltip: Managed by extension — duplicate to edit
snippet.unknownCategoryTooltip: This snippet's category is no longer registered. The providing extension may have been uninstalled.

form.duplicateNameHint: Another snippet with this name exists in the same category.

runDrawer.title: Select assets to run on
